title: rosa × burboniana
intro: Rosa × burboniana, also known as the Bourbon rose or Bourbon rose hybrid, is a type of hybrid rose plant that originated from the cross between Rosa damascena and Rosa centifolia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rosa × burboniana include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression due to its calming effects. Rosa × burboniana is often used in herbal preparations such as rose oil, rosewater, and dried rose petals, which are used in perfumes, skincare products, and as a natural remedy for various health issues.
